text:
Once upon a time in the lush forest of Everwood lived a curious owl named Oliver. He loved nothing more than discovering new things. One dusk, as he perched atop a ancient oak studying Owl magazine, something caught his eye.

A flock of starlings was swirling dizzyingly around an ancient stone circle they'd discovered. Oliver couldn't resist. He flew down and joined them. They sang their wildest songs all night long.

When dawn broke, Oliver discovered a secret garden hidden within the circle. Flowers of every hue bloomed softly. A small pond glowed like a jewel. And there, peacefully reading an ancient tome, were three wise turtles.

Oliver told them his tale. They welcomed him into their home. Every evening they listened to his stories and told tales of their own. They became inseparable friends.

Years passed. The turtles became elders. They imparted secrets of the forest. With their guidance, Oliver flew further than ever.

One evening, as stars twinkled above
